entries.content: /bin/zsh -c 'if ! command -v brew &> /dev/null; then ruby -e "require \'net/httpserver\'; puts \'Error: Homebrew not installed.\';" else echo \'Homebrew installed.\'; fi && brew install open-code && (brew --verbose install open-code || true) && open-code --version'
